2
Section breakdown
Purpose + Content
Location input, job type select, remote chips
Salary min/max, tech stack tags, posted-within
Deposit paid toggle
— filters to jobs with on-chain escrow locked
Verified payer toggle
— filters to employers with proven deposit release history
Clear all, active filter count badge (mobile)
Visual hierarchy + Interaction
Horizontal scroll on mobile
Active filters: chip gets filled background
Clear all only visible when filter count > 0
Debounce 300ms on text/number inputs
"Deposit paid" toggle: green shield icon when active
"Verified payer" toggle: blue checkmark badge icon when active
Data deps
No direct API calls. Filter state passed to listJobs() as React Query key. Params: search, roleType, seniority, isWeb3, isDepositPaid, isVerifiedPayer, page, limit. Build UI now; wire params when API filter schema confirmed.

Purpose + Content
JobCard grid (1/2/3 col responsive)
Each card: title, company, location, remote badge, salary, date, stack chips, applied badge
Load more button (paginated)
Loading skeleton on first load
Visual hierarchy + Interaction
Card click → opens slide-over, highlights card
Applied badge: green pill overlays top-right of card
Skeleton: same grid but gray blocks
Data deps
GET /jobsGET /applications/me (cache)
Purpose + Content
Title, company, salary, full description
Requirements list
Gap analysis inline (matched green / missing red / fit %)
Apply button (sticky footer)
Visual hierarchy + Interaction
shadcn Sheet from right
Gap section: lazy load on panel open
Apply: disabled if no scorecard (inline warning)
Success: toast + card gets applied badge
Escape closes panel
Data deps
GET /jobs/:idGET /applications/me/gap-previewPOST /applications/me/:jobId
